/home/developer/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -s USE_SDL=0 -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s NO_EXIT_RUNTIME=1 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=[_main,_get_video_buffer] -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=[ccall,cwrap,HEAPU8] --preload-file /home/developer/projects/roms_backup@/roms --shell-file /home/developer/projects/GB-EMU/src/index.html @CMakeFiles/gb-emu.dir/objects1 -o gb-emu.html
